title: delphinium nanum subsp. albolilaceum
intro: Delphinium nanum subsp. albolilaceum is a subspecies of the delphinium plant, commonly known as the small delphinium or alba delphinium, characterized by its compact growth habit and white or pale blue flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. Delphinium nanum subsp. albolilaceum is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and promoting relaxation, as well as providing relief from muscle spasms and menstrual cramps. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
